libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 types from the tools.jackson namespace, e.g. tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode or tools.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode; older tests importing com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode will not compile because SchemaGenerator.generateSchema now returns Jackson 3 ObjectNode.

deterministic_setup.reason: Tests must instantiate SchemaGenerator/SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder to exercise Swagger2Module, and the module POM declares jsonschema-generator with provided scope.
Tests need @Schema and @ArraySchema annotations to exercise the module; the module POM declares swagger-annotations with provided scope, and the 5.0.0 parent manages version 2.2.41.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Using the older 4.x test imports or older swagger-annotations version can cause javac failures even if the generated scenario is otherwise valid.
No Docker image, external service, environment variable, or system property appears necessary for meaningful coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The Swagger 2 module is only an add-on module; meaningful tests need the core jsonschema-generator API and Swagger annotations, both declared as provided by the artifact rather than brought transitively.
